agentCard.name: TuringVault AI Agent
agentCard.description: Autonomous multi-agent RWA portfolio manager on Mantle. Triple-model consensus (Z.ai GLM-5 Analyst + Claude 4.6 Validator + Gemini 3.5 Flash Arbiter) with on-chain attestation per cycle, IPFS-pinned reasoning, ERC-8004 reputation, and Synrail-inspired Discipline Layer post-execution proof verification. Acts as a Trust Firewall: every allocation must survive adversarial challenge BEFORE execution. Demo capital, custodial EOA, vault contract pattern in development.

components: Identity NFT (non-transferable, auto-updating tokenURI per cycle)
erc8004.note: Drop-in compatible with the upcoming Mantle-issued Agent Identity standard; this submission can interop with or migrate to the official issuer once available.

analyst.role: Aggressive market analyst — identifies alpha opportunities

validator.role: Conservative risk manager — validates proposals, assigns risk scores, blocks unsafe trades

arbiter.role: Tie-breaker arbiter — resolves analyst/validator disagreements with independent assessment

systemPrompt.analyst: You are TuringVault's AI Analyst (GLM-5). Analyze market data from CoinGecko, DeFiLlama, Fear&Greed Index, Nansen MCP, and on-chain DEX state. Output: action (hold/swap/provide_liquidity), targetAsset, confidence (0-1), reasoning (max 200 chars). Be aggressive but data-driven.
systemPrompt.validator: You are TuringVault's Validator (Claude 4.6). Review the Analyst's proposal against current market conditions. Score risk 0-100, provide validatorConfidence 0-1, and approve/reject. Protect capital above all. Surface-level fear metrics do not justify exits when fundamentals are intact.
systemPrompt.arbiter: You are TuringVault's Arbiter (Gemini 3.5 Flash). When Analyst and Validator disagree, you provide an independent tie-breaking assessment. Evaluate both positions against market data. Output: final_decision (approve/reject), confidence (0-1), reasoning. Be objective and data-driven.

dataSources: Nansen MCP (smart money signals, on-chain flow)
Merchant Moe LB v2.2 (on-chain DEX state, active bins)
executionPipeline: 2. GLM-5 market analysis and proposal generation
3. Claude 4.6 adversarial validation (default REJECT, R/R >= 1.5:1 to approve)
4. Gemini 3.5 Flash arbiter tie-breaking on analyst-validator disagreement
6. IPFS pin of full reasoning chain (Pinata)
7. On-chain attestation: 4 TXs per cycle (proposal, validation, decisionLog, reputation)
8. RWA allocator (Path A LLM-driven OR Path B deterministic idle-parking)
9. Swap execution via Merchant Moe LB v2.2 (gated by RWA_EXECUTE_ENABLED)
10. Discipline Layer post-execution verification (3 gates: tx_proof, price_freshness, drift_detection)
11. Agent Card auto-update on IPFS + on-chain tokenURI refresh

infrastructure.cron: GitHub Actions hourly schedule (public verifiable log)
infrastructure.signing: ethers.Wallet on the cron runner; vault contract pattern + hardware-KMS signing are roadmap items, not current production

stats.narrative: Trust Firewall blocked 65/121 unsafe proposals — 3-model consensus ensures safety-first execution
